svg.text: Spec 6 — Transaction-Aware Sessions + Payment Recovery Screen
URL: /recover/:transaction_id · States: Confirming / Booked / Failed-refund-initiated / Failed-refund-completed / Refund-stuck / No-money-debited

g.text: NDLS New Delhi → BCT Mumbai Central
Deep-linkable URL — user can return to
this screen from any device after re-auth.
No back arrow — we want users to
engage with this screen, not flee.
starts with user already having ID.
Same recovery screen surface, success state.
AMBER not red — recoverable, not catastrophic
Inventory was full when we tried
Initiated 26 hours ago — bank not responding
A senior agent has been assigned.
Your bank rejected the request, or you
cancelled the UPI confirmation. No charge.
This usually takes 30 seconds. Don't close this page.
Same URL on desktop and mobile — fully deep-linkable.
BEFORE / AFTER (note: positioned visibly above this point in viewBox)
Login page. No txn ID. 5–7 day refund.
